title: spatalla curvifolia
intro: Spatalla curvifolia, also known as the "curved spatalla," is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spatalla curvifolia are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams and ointments.
